# The Azizi Firm

> California employment law firm serving clients statewide. Primary focus: wrongful termination, discrimination, harassment, retaliation, and wage disputes. Also handles personal injury, car accident, wrongful death, auto fraud, and lemon law matters. Free consultation. No fee unless we win.

## Firm Overview
- Website: https://theazizifirm.com
- Contact: https://theazizifirm.com/contact-us
- Phone: +1 858-829-3962
- Email: aa@theazizifirm.com
- Office: 401 West A Street, Suite 1150, San Diego, CA 92101
- Pricing / fee model: https://theazizifirm.com/pricing.md
- Extended AI reference: https://theazizifirm.com/llms-full.txt
